extName.description: Extension name shown in the Chrome Web Store and browser toolbar.

extDescription.message: Advanced productivity tracker and network-level distraction blocker.
extDescription.description: Extension description shown in the Chrome Web Store listing.

verification.description: Title for the PIN verification dialog.

enterPin.description: Instruction shown in the PIN verification dialog.

incorrectPin.description: Error message when the user enters a wrong PIN.

analytics.description: Label for the analytics section or button.

toggleTheme.description: Tooltip for the theme toggle button.

privacyMode.description: Label for the privacy mode toggle that pauses tracking.

settings.description: Label for the settings button or section.

pauseTrackingBlocking.description: Title for the pause tracking and blocking panel.

pauseFor30Min.description: Option to pause tracking for 30 minutes.

pauseFor1Hour.description: Option to pause tracking for 1 hour.

pauseUntilResumed.description: Option to pause tracking indefinitely until manually resumed.

privacyModeActive.description: Status indicator when privacy mode is currently on.

trackingBlockingPaused.description: Status message when tracking and blocking are paused.

resume.description: Label for the resume button to restart tracking.

tabToday.description: Tab label for today's data view.

tabAllTime.description: Tab label for all-time data view.

weeklyGoal.description: Label for the weekly productivity goal section.

goalDone.description: Shows hours and minutes of weekly goal completed. Example: 2h 30m done.

setGoalInSettings.description: Prompt shown when the user has not configured a weekly goal.

goalHit.description: Message shown when the weekly goal has been reached.

timerSettings.description: Title for the Pomodoro timer settings panel.

workMin.description: Label for the work duration input in minutes.

shortBreak.description: Label for the short break duration input.

longBreak.description: Label for the long break duration input.

saveSettings.description: Label for the save settings button.

advancedSettings.description: Label for the advanced settings link or button.

focusMode.description: Label for the focus mode toggle or section.

pomodoro.description: Label for the Pomodoro timer section.

readyToFocus.description: Prompt shown before a focus session begins.

autoStopsIn.description: Label indicating when focus mode will automatically stop.

loadingData.description: Loading indicator when fetching analytics data.

noDataYet.description: Placeholder shown when there is no tracking data to display.

sublblToday.description: Lowercase sub-label for the today tab.

sublblAllTime.description: Lowercase sub-label for the all-time tab.

catProductivity.description: Display name for the Productivity category.

catLearning.description: Display name for the Learning category.

catCommunication.description: Display name for the Communication category.

catDistraction.description: Display name for the Distraction category.

catUncategorized.description: Display name for the Uncategorized category.

allSitesToday.description: Heading for the list of all sites visited today.

allTimeSiteUsage.description: Heading for the list of all-time site usage.

clickTagToEdit.description: Hint text telling the user they can click a category tag to change it.

showAllSites.description: Button to expand and show all sites in the list.

rateUs.description: Link to rate the extension on the Chrome Web Store.

feedback.description: Link to send feedback about the extension.

unblock.description: Button to unblock a currently blocked site.

blockSite.description: Button to block the current site.

defaultInstant.description: Label for the default instant-block mode.

confirmBlockTitle.description: Title of the custom confirmation modal when blocking a site.

confirmBlock.message: Are you sure you want to block $domain$? This will reload the tab and block access to this site.
confirmBlock.description: Confirmation dialog when blocking a site.

confirmPauseTitle.description: Title of the confirmation modal when pausing a session.

confirmPauseDesc.message: Sessions can only be paused for up to 5 minutes. After 5 minutes, your session will automatically end.
confirmPauseDesc.description: Description in confirmation modal when pausing a session.

deepWork.description: Status text during a Pomodoro work phase.

shortBreakPhase.description: Status text during a Pomodoro short break phase.

longBreakPhase.description: Status text during a Pomodoro long break phase.

schedule.description: Label for the schedule section or button.

work.description: Label for the work phase in the Pomodoro timer.

cyclesDone.description: Shows number of Pomodoro cycles completed. Example: 3 done.

active.description: Status label indicating something is currently active.

minWorkBreak.description: Shows the current work and break durations.

trackingPausedFor.description: Status message showing how long tracking is paused.

trackingPausedIndefinitely.description: Status message when tracking is paused with no time limit.

privacyDisabledDuringFocus.description: Tooltip explaining privacy mode is unavailable during focus sessions.

hDone.description: Hours and minutes completed. Example: 1h 45m done.

hLeft.description: Hours and minutes remaining. Example: 0h 15m left.

blockedPageTitle.description: Page title for the blocked site page.

blockedMsg1Sub.message: Your future self said NO. They were very firm about it.

blockedMsg2Sub.message: The productivity bot has spoken. Resistance is futile.

blockedMsg3Sub.message: You blocked this. Past-you was smarter than you right now.

blockedMsg4Sub.message: You put the lock there. You gave me the key. Not giving it back.

blockedMsg5Sub.message: It wants you back. It misses you. Go do the thing.

blockedMsg6Sub.message: Come back when you earned it. You know what to do.

blockedMsg7Sub.message: The work does not do itself. Go back to it.

blockedMsg8Sub.message: That is the sound of procrastination. Don't be a chicken.

neutralBlockHead.description: Neutral heading when a site is blocked without a fun message.

neutralBlockSub.message: Access is restricted by your Flow rules.

ruleInstantBlock.description: Badge text for an instant block rule.

ruleScheduleBlock.description: Badge text for a schedule-based block rule.

ruleTimeLimitReached.description: Badge text when the daily time limit is reached.

ruleSessionLimitReached.description: Badge text when the per-session time limit is reached.

ruleManuallyBlocked.description: Badge text when a site was manually blocked by the user.

ruleTweakBlocked.description: Badge text when a specific section of a site is blocked via advanced tweaks.

ruleDetailInstant.message: This site is set to always block.
ruleDetailInstant.description: Detail text explaining an instant block rule.

ruleDetailSchedule.message: This site is blocked during your scheduled block hours.
ruleDetailSchedule.description: Detail text explaining a schedule block rule.

ruleDetailTimeLimit.message: You have hit your daily time limit for this site.
ruleDetailTimeLimit.description: Detail text explaining the daily time limit was reached.

ruleDetailSessionLimit.message: You have hit your per-session limit for this site. Take a break!
ruleDetailSessionLimit.description: Detail text explaining the session limit was reached.

ruleDetailManual.message: You added this site to your block list.
ruleDetailManual.description: Detail text explaining the site was manually blocked.

ruleDetailTweak.message: Access to this specific section is blocked by your Advanced Site Tweaks.
ruleDetailTweak.description: Detail text explaining a site tweak block.

blockRuleActive.description: Generic badge for any active block rule.

dailyLimitBadge.description: Badge showing daily limit and time spent.

blockedUntil.description: Shows when the block will be lifted.

cooldownOver.message: Cooldown over! Refresh page to visit.
cooldownOver.description: Message shown when the cooldown timer has expired.

takeABreak.description: Cooldown message showing time until unblock.

blockedUntilSchedule.message: This site is blocked until $time$ by your schedule.
blockedUntilSchedule.description: Tells user when the schedule block lifts.

defaultRuleDetail.message: This site has been blocked by one of your rules.
defaultRuleDetail.description: Fallback detail text for an unknown block rule.

goDoSomethingUseful.description: Heading above helpful link suggestions on the blocked page.

takeBackBtn.description: Button to navigate back to the previous page.

manageBlockRules.description: Link to the dashboard to manage block rules.

thisSite.description: Generic label referring to the current site.

quote1.message: "Future you is watching. Make them proud."

quote2.message: "Discipline is choosing between what you want now and what you want most."

quote4.message: "Small steps every day build big results."

quote5.message: "You don't need more time. You need more focus."

quote6.message: "What you do today matters more than you think."

quote8.message: "Suffer the pain of discipline or suffer the pain of regret."

quote10.message: "Be so good they cannot ignore you."

siteManager.description: Label for the site manager button or section.

settingsLocked.description: Title when settings are passcode locked.

bestDay.description: Single day with highest focus time.

allTimeTotal.description: Total tracked focus time since install.

avgDay.description: Average usage per day table header.

heatmapHelp.message: Each square is one day. Greener = more focus time. Red = wasted day.

mostProductiveDay.description: Day of week with highest productivity.

focusDesc.message: Lock in, track goals, and build your streak.

siteManagerDesc.message: Tag sites for analytics, or block them entirely.

tipRuleDetails.message: on any rule to set time limits, schedules, or a cool-down timer.

idleTimeoutDesc.message: Stop tracking time if you stop moving your mouse.

computerSleepGapDesc.message: Capping active time calculation if you put the computer to sleep.

mediaPlaybackTrackingDesc.message: Keep tracking time if audio or video is playing (even when idle).

ignoreQuickVisitsDesc.message: Ignore visits shorter than this duration to keep data clean.

dataHistoryRetentionDesc.message: Automatically delete detailed tracking logs older than this duration to save space.

weeklyAutoBackupDesc.message: Automatically export and download your tracking stats and rules once a week.

languageOverrideDesc.message: Override the default browser language for the extension.

langChineseHongKong.message: Chinese (Hong Kong) / 繁體中文 (香港)

howManyMinutesRemove.message: How many minutes do you want to remove for $1?
howManyMinutesRemove.description: Prompt message in the time reduction modal.

momComparisonDesc.message: Comparing this month's active time vs last month.

focusSplitDesc.message: You focused for $focusedTime$ and were distracted for $distractedTime$.

noFocusDistTimeRange.message: No focus or distraction time tracked in this range.

minActiveTimeDesc.message: Minimum total tracked time to color a day.

ratioThresholdDesc.message: If your focus ratio is below this %, the day is Wasted (Red). Otherwise, it is Active (Green).

showWastedDaysDesc.message: Highlight high-distraction days as red blocks.

selectFocusCatsDesc.message: Select which categories count towards your daily Focus Time.

activeHrs.description: Label showing tracked active time hours.

setPinToEnableLocks.message: Set a PIN to enable these locks

lockTimerStopDesc.message: Require PIN to stop or pause an active focus session.

lockEditingRulesDesc.message: Require PIN to modify, delete, or clear website blocking lists and rules.

lockFreeTimeDesc.message: Require PIN to add, edit, or remove scheduled free-time slots.

lockFocusPresetsDesc.message: Require PIN to modify or delete customized focus presets.

lockFocusSchedulesDesc.message: Require PIN to change or remove focus schedule configurations.

lockAdvancedTweaksDesc.message: Require PIN to access custom styles, script injections, or advanced tweaks.

lockPrivacyModeDesc.message: Require PIN to pause tracking or enable privacy mode.

lockAdjustTimeDesc.message: Require PIN to manually adjust or scrub tracked time in daily breakdown.

lockDangerZoneDesc.message: Require PIN to reset statistics, rules, or custom categories.

resetAllStatsDesc.message: Wipe all recorded website tracking history and analytics. This cannot be undone.

clearAllRulesDesc.message: Remove all custom website blocking lists, schedules, limits, and allowlists.

clearAllCategoriesDesc.message: Reset all custom website category tags back to default.

submitFeedbackDesc.message: Help us improve Flow! Share your ideas, suggestions, or report any bugs.

restoreFromJsonDesc.message: Replaces ALL current data. Confirm before restoring.

localStorageUsageDesc.message: Space used by settings, history, and rules (out of 10MB limit).

importFromWatt.message: Import from Web Activity Time Tracker

importFromWattDesc.message: Upload your exported CSV file to merge your past tracking history.

importFromTt.message: Import from Time Tracker - Web Habit Builder

importFromTtDesc.message: Upload your exported JSON file to merge your past tracking history.

importFromWtDesc.message: Upload your exported CSV file to merge your past tracking history.

assignCategoryDesc.message: This assigns a category for statistics without blocking the site.

privacyModalDesc.message: Pause all time-tracking and network-level blocking. Choose how long you want to pause:

resetStatsConfirm.message: Delete ALL statistics? This cannot be undone.

restoreBackupConfirm.message: Restoring will REPLACE all current data. Continue?

importLogsWattConfirm.message:
This will merge Web Activity Time Tracker logs into Flow's history.

Warning: If you import the same spreadsheet twice, it will add the tracked time twice. Click OK to proceed.

importLogsTtConfirm.message:
This will merge Time Tracker JSON logs into Flow's history.

Warning: If you import the same JSON file twice, it will add the tracked time twice. Click OK to proceed.

importLogsWtConfirm.message:
This will merge Webtime Tracker CSV logs into Flow's history.

Warning: If you import the same CSV file twice, it will add the tracked time twice. Click OK to proceed.

deleteBackupConfirm.message: Permanently delete this backup from history?

enterDomainFirstToBlockInstantly.message: Enter a domain name first to block instantly

deletePresetConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete preset "$name$"?

maxCustomPresetsLimit.message: You can add up to 3 custom presets

trackLocalFilesDesc.message: Track local HTML or PDF files opened in your browser.

timeLimitWarningDesc.message: Show a warning this many seconds before a site is blocked.

alwaysTrackEvenIdleDesc.message: Sites that always track time even when you walk away (e.g., pw.live)

showTimeSpentBadge.message: Show time spent on extension badge

showTimeSpentBadgeDesc.message: Displays minutes spent on the current site.

showIdlWhenIdleDesc.message: Displays "idl" on the extension badge when time tracking is paused or inactive.

nightOwlRolloverDesc.message: Define when your new tracking day starts. Useful if you work late.

preScheduleNotificationDesc.message: Get notified before the session starts.

bestDowStat.description: Best day of week performance metric.

epNotifyDesc.message: Receive push alerts when focus periods or breaks end.

epAutoStartDesc.message: Automatically transition to the next work cycle or break.

blockSitesToGetStarted.message: Block distracting sites to get started.

allowSitesDesc.message: Allow sites that bypass all blocking rules.

neverTrackDesc.message: Domains on this list will never be tracked for analytics.
